permissions.comment: Git safety for team work (DECISIONS-BASELINE §0023). ALLOW: push feature/bugfix/hotfix branches + open PRs to develop (owner's standing authorization) — the normal end of a slice. ASK: create a git tag (only on the owner's explicit request; never automatic). DENY: merge to develop/main, PR merge, release publish, force-push — protected branches change only via reviewed PR; the server-side branch protection is the real enforcement.
